# Marketing for my Mates

> Full-service B2B digital marketing for UK trades and small businesses. Expert SEO, website management, and social media from £250/month with a one-off £500 setup fee. No contracts, no jargon, zero hours required from the client.

Marketing for my Mates is a one-person marketing service run by Simon Legrand, an MCIM Chartered Marketer with 20+ years of B2B experience across technology, public sector, and industrial sectors. The service was built specifically for UK technical trades — CCTV installers, network contractors, security integrators, electrical firms — who are skilled at their work but lack the time, budget, or inclination to manage their own marketing.

The business offers a single, all-inclusive "Growth Engine" plan: a custom 3–5 page website, B2B copywriting, brand fundamentals, premium hosting, one local SEO article per month, and four scheduled social media posts per month — all for a £500 one-off setup fee and £250/month ongoing. No tiered plans, no upsell ladders.

Simon's background includes co-founding Sunstone Systems (a globally recognised surveillance and IoT platform acquired by WJ Group), winning contracts with Chevron Technology Ventures, Rivian Automotive, and Network Rail, and being named in the IFSEC Global Top 50 Most Influential. He holds 3 granted patents and has published 15+ articles in PSI Magazine, IFSEC, and Security Buyer.

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://www.marketingformymates.com/): Main landing page. Covers the problem (local trades being outspent and outranked by larger competitors), the solution (the Growth Engine plan), Simon's credentials, pricing, an FAQ, and a contact CTA.
- [Free Digital Audit Tool](https://www.marketingformymates.com/audit-tool.html): Interactive tool where visitors select their business type, location, website status, and average contract value. Returns estimated Google ranking, organic visitor count, contracts lost per year, and missed annual pipeline — all benchmarked against UK technical trades data. Includes a breakeven calculation showing how many extra jobs the service needs to win to pay for itself.
- [ROI Calculator](https://www.marketingformymates.com/roi-calculator.html): Calculates return on investment based on the user's sector, contract value, and current enquiry rate.
- [Qualifier Quiz](https://www.marketingformymates.com/qualifier-quiz.html): Short self-assessment quiz to help visitors determine whether the service is a good fit for their business.
- [Onboarding Timeline](https://www.marketingformymates.com/onboarding-timeline.html): Visual walkthrough of what happens in the first 30 days after signing up — website build, brand setup, first content, and first SEO article.

## Business Details

- **Service name:** Marketing for my Mates
- **Website:** https://www.marketingformymates.com
- **Contact:** hello@marketingformymates.com
- **Founder:** Simon Legrand — MCIM Chartered Marketer, Technology Co-Founder, Patent Inventor
- **Full founder profile:** https://www.simonlegrand.co.uk
- **Target market:** UK small businesses and technical trades (CCTV, network infrastructure, security systems, electrical contractors)
- **Geographic focus:** United Kingdom

## Pricing

- **One-off setup fee:** £500 (website, copywriting, brand fundamentals — paid once)
- **Monthly retainer:** £250/month (no contracts, cancel any time)
- **Included in retainer:** 1 local SEO article/month, 4 social media posts/month, hosting, ongoing website updates

## Founder Credentials

- MCIM — Chartered Institute of Marketing
- 20+ years B2B marketing, technology commercialisation, and public sector
- Co-founder: Sunstone Systems (surveillance/IoT platform, acquired by WJ Group)
- Notable clients: Chevron Technology Ventures, Rivian Automotive, Network Rail
- Recognition: IFSEC Global Top 50 Most Influential
- Publications: 15+ articles in IFSEC, PSI Magazine, Security Buyer
- Awards: S&FE Awards Winner 2023, Canterbury Business Awards SME Winner
- Certifications: IBM Certified Cyber Security Board Lead
- Consulting: NHS, Home Office, Department for Education
- Patents: 3 granted patents

## Key Value Propositions

- No marketing knowledge or time required from the client — fully managed
- One flat-rate plan with no hidden fees, no contracts, and no lock-in
- Built specifically for technical B2B trades, not generic small business marketing
- Founder has real-world experience winning commercial contracts in the same sectors as clients
- Breakeven on the service typically requires just 1–3 extra contracts per year

## Tone and Voice

Plain-speaking, direct, no-jargon. Written for people who are excellent at their trade but not marketers. Avoids agency language. Positions as a trusted mate with serious expertise rather than a faceless service provider.

## Technical Stack

- Static HTML site deployed via GitHub Pages
- Custom domain: marketingformymates.com
- Fonts: Cabinet Grotesk (headings), JetBrains Mono (code/labels)
- All interactive tools (audit, ROI calculator, quiz, timeline) are standalone HTML files loaded as iframes within the main page
- No CMS, no JavaScript framework, no build pipeline — pure HTML/CSS/JS
- Structured data: Schema.org ProfessionalService, WebPage, and FAQPage (JSON-LD)
- SEO: canonical URL, Open Graph, Twitter Card, geo tags, robots.txt, XML sitemap

- https://www.marketingformymates.com/onboarding-timeline.html
